gist.headline: Daily Hive Report
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just gave the README its daily polish, adding the latest news and community apps to the front page.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community highlights and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot with a monitor head (representing the bot) updating a giant digital billboard or scroll (the README) while Polly the bee watches approvingly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head painting new text on a large wooden signpost. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny painter's beret. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
